steps: These groups are not isomorphic: $\mathbb{Z}/2$ has order 2, whereas $\mathbb{Z}^2$ is infinite.
A homeomorphism would induce an isomorphism on $H_1$, which is impossible here.
In fact $\mathbb{R}P^2$ and $T^2$ have different genus, different Euler characteristics ($\chi(\mathbb{R}P^2) = 1$, $\chi(T^2) = 0$), and different orientability.
